title: Post Fiat Continuous Proof Maintenance Protocol
description: Defines how producers maintain a live, rolling proof surface with automated signal resolution, calibration drift detection, freshness guarantees, and atomic versioned updates. Fifth companion to pf-signal-schema, pf-routing-protocol, pf-resolution-protocol, and pf-aggregation-protocol.

freshness_grade.description: Proof surface freshness classification. LIVE: resolved within staleness_threshold. RECENT: within 2x threshold. STALE: within 4x threshold. EXPIRED: beyond 4x threshold.

drift_status.description: Calibration drift status from CUSUM analysis. STABLE: no drift detected. WATCH: CUSUM approaching threshold. DRIFTING: CUSUM exceeded threshold. DEGRADED: sustained drift beyond recovery window.

rolling_window.description: Metrics computed over a rolling time window.

window_days.description: Window length in days. 0 for all_time.

accuracy.description: Wilson score CI on directional accuracy.

brier_score.description: Mean Brier score in window. 0 = perfect, 0.25 = random.

calibration_slope.description: Linear regression slope of outcomes on forecasts. 1.0 = perfect calibration.

cusum_state.description: CUSUM (Cumulative Sum) calibration drift detector state. Detects systematic shifts in accuracy away from a target rate.

cusum_pos.description: Positive CUSUM statistic. Detects upward drift (improving accuracy). Reset to 0 when negative.

cusum_neg.description: Negative CUSUM statistic (stored as positive magnitude). Detects downward drift (degrading accuracy). Reset to 0 when negative.

drift_detected_at.description: Timestamp when drift was first detected. Null if STABLE.

target_accuracy.description: Target accuracy for CUSUM baseline. Typically the all-time historical accuracy.

allowance.description: CUSUM allowance (slack) parameter K. Shifts must exceed K per observation to accumulate. Default: half the detectable shift magnitude.

threshold.description: CUSUM decision threshold H. CUSUM exceeding H triggers drift detection. Higher H = fewer false alarms, slower detection.

observations_since_reset.description: Number of observations processed since last CUSUM reset.

run_length.description: Consecutive observations in current drift direction. 0 if STABLE.

calibration_trajectory.description: Time series of calibration metrics for trend analysis.

checkpoints.description: Ordered calibration snapshots at regular intervals.

n_cumulative.description: Cumulative resolved signals at this checkpoint.

trend.description: Linear trend fitted to checkpoint accuracy series. Null if fewer than 3 checkpoints.

slope_per_day.description: Accuracy change per day. Positive = improving.

last_resolved_at.description: Timestamp of the most recently resolved signal.

last_update_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent proof surface update.

staleness_threshold_hours.description: Maximum age in hours before proof surface is considered stale. Default: 24 hours.

age_hours.description: Current age of proof surface in hours since last_update_at.

signals_since_last_update.description: Signals pushed but not yet resolved since last proof update.

next_update_due.description: When the next proof update should occur based on staleness_threshold.

snapshot_metadata.description: Append-only versioned snapshot metadata for atomic proof updates.

snapshot_id.description: Unique identifier for this snapshot (ISO timestamp or monotonic counter).

parent_snapshot_id.description: ID of the previous snapshot this one extends. Null for the first snapshot.

n_resolved_total.description: Total resolved signals in this snapshot (cumulative).

n_new_resolved.description: Signals newly resolved in this update cycle.

resolution_delta.description: Incremental resolution results from a single maintenance cycle.

n_attempted.description: Signals attempted for resolution in this cycle.

n_failed.description: Signals that could not be resolved (missing price data).

n_skipped.description: Signals skipped (already resolved in previous cycle).

oneOf.description: Accuracy of newly resolved signals only.

accuracy_this_cycle.description: Accuracy of newly resolved signals only. Null when no signals resolved.

price_data_source.description: Source of price data for resolution (e.g. 'yahoo_finance', 'csv_fallback').

rolling_windows.description: Metrics computed over rolling time windows.

reputation.description: Current Producer Reputation Score computed from rolling metrics.

previous_score.description: Score from previous snapshot for delta tracking. Null for first snapshot.

score_delta.description: Change from previous snapshot. Positive = improving. Null for first snapshot.

limitations.description: Auto-detected limitations with bias direction and magnitude.
